description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test and deploy, using PHP Docker images (php:7.1, php:7.2, php:rc) and a global before_script that runs `curl https://getcomposer.org/installer --output installer`, `php ./installer --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer && rm ./installer`, `curl https://phpdoc.org/phpDocumentor.phar --output /usr/local/bin/phpdoc`, `chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/phpdoc`, `apt-get update && apt-get install -y zlib1g-dev libzip-dev graphviz`, `docker-php-ext-install zip`, and `composer install`. In the test stage define three jobs named test:php-7.1, test:php-7.2, and test:php-rc, each using the matching image and executing `composer run test`. In the deploy stage add a packagist job using php:7.2 that overrides the before_script with `echo "do nothing"` and runs a curl POST to the Packagist API with $PACKAGIST_USER and $PACKAGIST_TOKEN to update the package, and a pages job also using php:7.2 that runs `composer run phpdoc`, publishes the `public` directory as an artifact, and is limited to tags matching `v1.x`. No caches, services, or additional variables are defined.
